field.title: %Form% Category
field.name: %prefix%_%form%_category
field.label: Category
field.options2:
{"query":"SELECT a.id AS value, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(b.titles, '$."$lang->getTag()"')) AS text
FROM #__categories AS a
LEFT JOIN #__cck_store_item_categories AS b ON b.id = a.id
WHERE a.published=1 AND a.id=%more_category:%prefix%_%name%% AND a.access IN ($user->getAuthorisedViewLevels()) AND extension = "com_content"
ORDER BY text ASC","table":"#__content","name":"","where":"","value":"","orderby":"","orderby_direction":"ASC","limit":"","language_detection":"joomla","language_codes":"EN,GB,US,FR","language_default":"EN","attr1":"","attr2":"","attr3":"","attr4":"","attr5":"","attr6":""}
